title: pogonorrhinum scoparium
side_effects: Pogonorrhinum scoparium can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory problems. In severe cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extract can lead to liver damage, kidney failure, and even death. Other potential side effects include nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, as well as interactions with certain medications that can exacerbate existing health conditions. Improper use of pogonorrhinum scoparium can also cause dizziness, headaches, and fatigue in some individuals.
